phase_0_inventory.note: 4 primary PDFs + 2 open-data CSVs + 12 GOV.UK bulk datasets inventoried via manual discovery (pre-dated 01-inventory.mjs)

phase_1_archive.note: All 4 PDFs sha256'd with _meta.json. 02-archive.mjs idempotent verification passes (4 of 4 unchanged).

phase_1b_visual_evidence.note: 7 page-image PNGs generated at 150 DPI. Served via /archive/bradford/images/... route handler. Surfaced in SourceAnnotation popover as thumbnail + lightbox.

phase_2_extract.note: Values extracted by hand in earlier sessions. 03-extract-pdf.mjs (automated) scheduled for ROADMAP Phase E.

phase_3_crosscheck.note: Tier 1 values pass source-truth validator. Tier 3 PDFs cross-checked visually via page images. No Benford z-score recorded yet (validator scaffold).

phase_4_populate.note: All field_sources carry NORTH-STAR §4 schema (tier + extraction_method + sha256/archive_exempt + page + excerpt + page_image_url).

phase_5_verify.note: Passes audit-north-star 0/5 gaps. tier-classification validator: 0 errors (Bradford is in STRICT_COUNCILS set).

phase_6_document.note: docs/BRADFORD-AUDIT.md with full Datasheet for Datasets structure + per-field register.

phase_7_ship.note: To be marked true on merge of feat/bradford-north-star-complete on both repos.
